name: robofarm
description: Robo Farm TypeScript transpile workflow for car-related runtime files.

scripts.build:ts: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp .ts-build/settings.js settings.js && cp .ts-build/state.js state.js && cp .ts-build/loop.js loop.js && cp .ts-build/menu.js menu.js && cp .ts-build/io.js io.js && cp .ts-build/render.js render.js
